title: Logs Telemetry Cluster
content:
## Logs

### Viewing Cluster Logs

In the Kelvin UI you can view the logs of a Cluster and all the Workloads running on the Cluster.

    You can configure the Log options in the Configuration section of the Cluster.

    [Click here](./clusters-dashboard.md#configuring-cluster-logs) to read the full documentation.

From **Clusters** menu find the Cluster row and click on the logs icon to the right hand side of the row.

And then you will see the logs being displayed in a Grafana environment.

## Telemetry

### Viewing Cluster Telemetry

In the Kelvin UI you can view the Telemetry of the Cluster. It will show you the resources used on the hardware or in the case of a Virtual Machine, the resources the VM is using.

    You can configure the Telemetry options in the Configuration section of the Cluster.

    [Click here](./clusters-dashboard.md#configuring-cluster-telemetry) to read the full documentation.

From **Clusters** menu find the Cluster row and click on the telemetry icon to the right hand side of the row.

And then you will see the telemetry being displayed in a Grafana environment.
